Challenge the city.

🔥 Where locals and travelers connect through challenges.

Hilads connects locals and travelers in every city through challenges. Drop one for the other side — pick a type, give it a title, watch people accept. Once it's done, the creator validates. Real-time, no sign-up.

How Hilads works

Pick your city. Launch a challenge for the other side, or accept one that speaks to you. Meet locals and travelers through what you actually want to do — food, place, culture, help. Hilads makes every city feel alive, right now.

Browse all Hilads cities
